text.message: Sorry blue couplet give you that port
That’s okay I would have done the same
However, in the spirit of catan lore, I must now destroy everything you hold dear
When the dev card strat gives you an immediate road building 👉👈
you need a lot of skill to pull it off though
Hey I ain’t hating on it
however not playing my knight before rolling maybe wasnt my best move
Takes a lot of skill that
i havent gotten a single ressource in like 15 turns lol
I predict no 9s will roll the whole game
i guess only having 3 numbers is quite hit or miss
Yeah you either crush it or die trying
Black can you leave me off for a turn
